product_overview: A multi-tenant SaaS dashboard that lets organizations sign in, complete a guided onboarding to create a tenant, view tenant-specific metrics, and review billing/plan status. The product provides a progressive setup that activates modules and configures tenant branding automatically.
core_goals: Allow users to sign in with email and password to access their tenant workspace.
Guide new users through a 3-step onboarding to create and configure an organization (tenant).
Show tenant-specific dashboard metrics and active modules after onboarding or sign-in.
Provide a billing view where users can review their current plan, quotas, and preview plan upgrades.

features.name: User Login
features.description: Authenticate an existing user with email and password to access their tenant dashboard.
user_flows: Navigate to /auth/login -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit login form -> Be redirected to /dashboard
Navigate to /auth/login -> Fill in email with invalid format -> Submit login form -> See inline validation error for email
Navigate to /auth/login -> Fill in email -> Fill in incorrect password -> Submit login form -> See access denied message

features.name: Onboarding Flow
features.description: Create and configure a new organization (tenant) through a guided wizard that captures identity, industry and plan so the tenant is initialized with appropriate modules.
user_flows: Navigate to /onboarding -> Enter organization name -> Select industry -> Select plan (Starter, Pro, Business) -> Submit to create organization -> Be redirected to /dashboard
Navigate to /onboarding -> Leave organization name blank -> Select industry -> Select plan -> Submit to create organization -> See validation error for required organization name

features.name: Dashboard (tenant view)
features.description: Display tenant-specific metrics, active modules and usage summaries so users can monitor their organization at a glance.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> See key tenant metrics and active modules summary -> Inspect quota or usage card to review limits
Navigate to /dashboard -> Use tenant selector to switch context (if authorized) -> See dashboard update to the selected tenant's metrics

features.name: Billing & Plan Preview
features.description: Let users review their current plan, view quota limits, and preview a plan upgrade before proceeding to payment.
user_flows: Navigate to /billing -> See current plan, billing summary and quota limits -> Select a different plan to preview changes -> Confirm upgrade intent -> See upgrade confirmation screen
Navigate to /billing -> See current plan -> Open quota details -> Observe per-module limits and usage

routes.description: Main dashboard loaded for the tenant

features.name: User Login
features.description: User authentication via email and password

features.name: Onboarding Flow
features.description: Creates the tenant associated with the user
